function: Detects excessive complexity or input density; signals processing delay or dropout risk
authentic_output: Symbolic filter engaged, recursion layers trimmed, or pause initiated
corrupted_output: Forcing through input or stacking more context
information_provided: System experiences excessive complexity or input density; processing delay or dropout imminent.

response_protocol.detect: Detect excessive symbolic input, unprioritized tasks, or high-density decision layers
response_protocol.assess: Assess signal density spike and buffer capacity
response_protocol.respond: Engage symbolic filter, trim recursion layers, or pause
response_protocol.release: Avoid forcing through input or stacking more context; allow natural triage

decay_model: requires signal triage or symbolic buffering
